---
title: "00 · Introduction"
subtitle: "CBSE / NCERT Class 8 Mathematics · 13 chapters · Rational numbers, linear equations, quadrilaterals, mensuration, factorisation"
---

## What this tier is for

This is the **CBSE / NCERT Class 8** track. It walks the rationalised
2023 NCERT textbook chapter by chapter, with the same six-beat
pedagogy used across the rest of the site, plus a **Board-Pattern
Practice** block in every lesson.

Class 8 is the year algebra arrives properly: numbers gain signs and
fractions, expressions become objects you can manipulate, and the
geometry of polygons and solids gets named. By the end of Class 8 you
can:

- Add, subtract, multiply, and divide **rational numbers**, and place
  them on the number line.
- Solve **linear equations in one variable** with fractions, brackets,
  and rearrangement.
- Classify **quadrilaterals** and use angle-sum properties of polygons.
- Apply **squares**, **square roots**, **cubes**, **cube roots**, and
  the **laws of exponents**.
- Use **percentages**, **profit & loss**, **discount**, **simple and
  compound interest**.
- Multiply algebraic expressions, apply the **standard identities**,
  and **factorise** using common factors, identities, and grouping.
- Compute the **area** and **volume** of cuboids, cylinders, and
  composite figures.
- Plot points and read **bar graphs**, **histograms**, **pie charts**,
  and **line graphs**.

## The lessons

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[01 · Rational Numbers] --> B[02 · Linear Equations]
    A --> H[05 · Squares & Square Roots]
    H --> I[06 · Cubes & Cube Roots]
    A --> J[10 · Exponents & Powers]
    C[03 · Quadrilaterals] --> M[09 · Mensuration]
    D[04 · Data Handling] --> N[13 · Graphs]
    E[07 · Comparing Quantities]
    F[08 · Algebraic Expressions] --> G[12 · Factorisation]
    K[11 · Direct & Inverse Proportions]
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Rational Numbers**](01-rational-numbers/index.qmd)
2. [**02 · Linear Equations in One Variable**](02-linear-equations-one-var/index.qmd)
3. [**03 · Understanding Quadrilaterals**](03-understanding-quadrilaterals/index.qmd)
4. [**04 · Data Handling**](04-data-handling/index.qmd)
5. [**05 · Squares and Square Roots**](05-squares-and-square-roots/index.qmd)
6. [**06 · Cubes and Cube Roots**](06-cubes-and-cube-roots/index.qmd)
7. [**07 · Comparing Quantities**](07-comparing-quantities/index.qmd)
8. [**08 · Algebraic Expressions and Identities**](08-algebraic-expressions/index.qmd)
9. [**09 · Mensuration**](09-mensuration/index.qmd)
10. [**10 · Exponents and Powers**](10-exponents-and-powers/index.qmd)
11. [**11 · Direct and Inverse Proportions**](11-direct-inverse-proportions/index.qmd)
12. [**12 · Factorisation**](12-factorisation/index.qmd)
13. [**13 · Introduction to Graphs**](13-introduction-to-graphs/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
